seo.title: SHAUN WEEK Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Enjoy total body workouts with SHAUN WEEK. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

data.descriptionShort: This ruthless 7-day workout is an all-out fat attack with Shaun T.
data.descriptionLong: SHAUN WEEK™: INSANE FOCUS is a seven-day, total-body program developed by Shaun T to motivate you like never before and help you Dig Deeper® than you ever thought possible.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.title: Focus T25
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.description: No time to work out? Now you can get an hour’s results in just 25 minutes.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.descriptionShort: No time to work out? Now you can get an hour’s results in just 25 minutes.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7t7cOH.descriptionLong: With FOCUS T25, Shaun T brings you short, intense workouts that give you ridiculous results. 25 minutes is all it takes for you to get those ripped abs, lose the baby fat, and get your six-pack.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.title: INSANITY MAX:30
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.description: Shaun T brings you the craziest 30 minutes of your day
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.descriptionShort: Shaun T brings you the craziest 30 minutes of your day
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tDtCj.descriptionLong: MAX:30 isn’t just INSANITY on fast forward. With 150 brand-new moves, it’s a whole new way to work out. Max-out a little farther each day, and when that happens, you’re going to look and feel amazing.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uEivP.title: Day 1: Insane Basics
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7uEivP.descriptionLong: Whether you’re new to Shaun T’s workouts or not, you’ll love the all-out hustle of the INSANITY-inspired moves in this fat-incinerating workout.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Shaun T has helped millions of people get in the best shape of their lives with his transformational fitness programs. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.

gAjyjR8IcIqVjU7DkPidcu.title: Introducing SHAUN WEEK™: INSANE FOCUS
gAjyjR8IcIqVjU7DkPidcu.descriptionLong: SHAUN WEEK™: INSANE FOCUS is a ruthless 7-day full-body workout developed by Shaun T to motivate you to focus like never before and Dig Deeper® than you ever thought possible. Shaun won’t make it easy—but you will get back on track in this sweat for your life workout!
